codeReview.summary: The feature adds doctor-side blocked-task detail coverage, but the claimed status/doctor parity is still not actually proven because `warcraft_status` exits early for blocked features while the new doctor assertions only compare against task-list-shaped expectations. This leaves the cross-surface parity contract unmet for real blocked features.

issues.description: `warcraft_status` still returns `toolError(blockedResult.message || 'Feature is blocked')` as soon as `checkBlocked()` reports a blocked feature, so it does not emit the blocked-task workspace/dependency payload that the review target says should stay coherent with `warcraft_doctor`. The new tests exercise mocked task summaries, but they never cover the real blocked-feature early-return path, so parity across the two public surfaces remains unproven and likely contradictory for genuine blocked features.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The repo-level services manifest expected by workers was not present at `/Users/beowulf/.factory/services.yaml`; the worker fell back to direct shell commands after a YAML helper failed, and the mission/library docs do not explain that this repo instead uses `.factory/services.yaml` under the project root.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Review setup hit ENOENT reading `/Users/beowulf/.factory/services.yaml`, while the transcript skeleton for session `c8e18dc3-2509-4cf7-a9b8-b672dfe7b59b` shows a failed YAML-helper attempt before falling back to `bun run test`; project files actually place the manifest at `/Users/beowulf/Work/personal/opencode-warcraft/.factory/services.yaml`.

summary: Reviewed handoff `2026-03-11T09-23-55-568Z__scrutiny-blocked-doctor-parity-fix__c8e18dc3-2509-4cf7-a9b8-b672dfe7b59b.json`, transcript skeleton, and commit `bcfacba803a5bd75a195ffd53fd91cb7e9c39577`. The doctor changes and new tests are narrowly scoped, but the feature does not satisfy its stated status/doctor parity goal because `warcraft_status` still short-circuits blocked features before exposing the blocked-task detail that doctor now reports.
